overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dark, grimy concrete stairwell and maintenance room with a flashlight. The clip features atmospheric low lighting, industrial textures, and a tense, ominous mood typical of the Silent Hill series.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete stairwell with metal railings

events.description: character passes a white sheet-draped figure on the right side of the stairs
approaches the top of the stairs where artificial light becomes visible from an adjacent room

agents.ego_description: walking up a dark concrete stairwell, sweeping a flashlight across the grimy walls and steps

entered.detail: grime-stained concrete walls with rough texture lining the stairwell
dark metal handrail running along the staircase
white painted graffiti or stain on the wall illuminated by flashlight
ghostly white sheet draped over an object on the stairs resembling a figure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow, dark concrete stairwell illuminated only by a flashlight. The walls are grimy and feature a white painted marking. A white sheet draped over an object creates a ghostly figure on the right side of the stairs. The atmosphere is claustrophobic and tense as the character climbs toward a dimly lit landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance room with cleaning tools and storage cabinets

events.description: exits the dark stairwell and enters a lit maintenance room with visible tools and equipment
approaches a wall-mounted rack holding shovels, brooms, and red containers

agents.ego_description: entering the maintenance room and walking toward the tool rack and double doors at the far end

entered.detail: stained concrete block walls of the maintenance room
metal electrical panel mounted on the wall near the entrance
long fluorescent light fixture illuminating the room with yellowish light
wall-mounted rack holding long-handled tools including shovels and brooms
red plastic bins or containers sitting on a shelf below the tools
pair of wooden doors with frosted glass windows at the far end of the room
small wooden desk or table against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit maintenance room from the stairwell, transitioning from flashlight illumination to yellowish fluorescent lighting. The room contains a wall-mounted rack with shovels and red storage containers, a wooden desk, and electrical panels. The character walks toward wooden double doors at the far end of the room, passing by the tools and equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dark stairwell into a dimly lit industrial maintenance room. It begins with the character ascending narrow concrete stairs, where a flashlight cuts through the gloom to reveal grimy walls and a ghostly white sheet draped over an object. As the character reaches the landing, the scene shifts from the oppressive darkness of the stairwell into the yellowish glow of fluorescent lighting. The camera then moves through the maintenance room, passing a wall-mounted rack of shovels, red storage containers, and a wooden desk. The movement finally carries the character across the equipment-filled space toward a set of wooden double doors at the far end of the room.
